tool_purpose: DeepLab v3 is an image segmentation model for TensorFlow Hub that segments images into different classes. It is trained on the PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset and achieves an accuracy of 77.21% on the validation set. Framework: TensorFlow Hub. Functionality: DeepLab v3. API call: hub.load('https://tfhub.dev/tensorflow/deeplabv3/1').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
doc_snippets: DeepLab v3 is an image segmentation model for TensorFlow Hub that segments images into different classes. It is trained on the PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset and achieves an accuracy of 77.21% on the validation set. Framework: TensorFlow Hub. Functionality: DeepLab v3. API call: hub.load('https://tfhub.dev/tensorflow/deeplabv3/1').
